meta.project: Platforme de Gamification et Génération de Leads (Agence de Voyage & Partenaires B2B)

product_overview: A gamified lead-generation backend for a travel agency and its B2B partners, enabling campaign setup, lead capture, prize-based roulette play, and secure prize retrieval. The platform is designed for viral distribution via widgets, referrals, and high-concurrency spin execution with Redis-based rate limiting and stock control.
core_goals: Capture qualified leads for campaign partners and the travel agency
Authenticate admin and B2B partner users to manage campaign operations
Serve active campaign configuration and prize inventory efficiently
Register player leads and issue initial play tokens/spins
Execute roulette spins safely under high concurrency with anti-spam and atomic stock depletion
Allow secure retrieval of won prizes by email with HMAC validation

features.name: Admin Authentication API
features.description: Authenticates superadmin and partner users and returns a session token plus role context for backend access.
user_flows: POST /api/trpc/loginAdmin with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with JWT token, role, and partnerId -> Use returned token for subsequent admin or partner requests
POST /api/trpc/loginAdmin with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized error -> No session token is issued

features.name: Campaigns API
features.description: Retrieves active campaign details, including campaign metadata, prizes, and inventory state for widgets and campaign pages.
user_flows: GET /api/trpc/getCampaignDetails?id=campaign_123 for an active campaign -> Receive 200 with campaign details, prize segments, and remaining inventory -> Render campaign and prize selection UI
GET /api/trpc/getCampaignDetails?id=missing_campaign -> Receive 404 Campaign not found -> Display an unavailable or expired campaign state

features.name: Lead Capture API
features.description: Registers a visitor as a campaign lead, links the lead to a partner and campaign, and grants play tokens for participation.
user_flows: POST /api/trpc/captureLead with email, name, phone, campaignId, partnerId, source, and referredByCode -> Receive 200 with player profile details and spin token count -> Allow the user to begin playing the campaign
POST /api/trpc/captureLead with a duplicate userId and campaignId combination or invalid lead data -> Receive validation or conflict error -> Do not create a second lead capture record

features.name: Spin Roulette API
features.description: Executes the prize wheel spin with rate limiting, token validation, cryptographic randomness, and atomic prize stock consumption.
user_flows: POST /api/trpc/spinRoulette with campaignId and email -> Redis rate-limit key allows the request -> System verifies an UNUSED PlayToken -> Cryptographically select a prize -> DECR prize stock in Redis -> Persist USED token and UserPrize in Prisma -> Receive 200 with won prize details and remaining spin count

POST /api/trpc/spinRoulette twice within 2 seconds for the same user -> Redis rate limiting rejects the second request -> Receive 429 Rate limit warning -> No prize is awarded and no token is consumed
POST /api/trpc/spinRoulette with no UNUSED PlayToken for the campaign -> Token lookup fails -> Receive 403 Forbidden with no spins left -> No draw is executed
POST /api/trpc/spinRoulette when selected prize stock is already depleted in Redis -> Atomic DECR returns negative stock -> Fallback prize is assigned -> Receive 200 with consolation prize details

features.name: Secure Prizes Retrieval API
features.description: Returns a user's won prizes by email only when the request is validated with a server-to-server SHA256 HMAC signature.
user_flows: GET /api/trpc/getUserPrizesByEmail?email=user@example.com&signature=valid_signature -> Signature verification succeeds -> Receive 200 with an array of won prizes
GET /api/trpc/getUserPrizesByEmail?email=user@example.com&signature=invalid_signature -> Signature verification fails -> Receive 401 Signature verification failed -> No prize data is returned

features.name: Admin Authentication API
features.description: Authenticates admin users and B2B partners, returning a session token.

features.name: Campaigns API
features.description: Retrieves details of active marketing campaigns, including cumulative prize segments and remaining inventory stocks.

features.name: Lead Capture API
features.description: Registers a user profile for a campaign and rewards them with initial spins.

endpoints.description: Capture visitor lead information and generate play tokens

response_schema.200: Player profile details and spin token count

features.name: Spin Roulette API
features.description: Concurrency-safe, rate-limited spin execution using a cryptographically secure RNG and atomic Redis stock depletion.

endpoints.description: Execute a prize draw segment and consume a token

response_schema.200: Won prize details and remaining spin count

features.name: Secure Prizes Retrieval API
features.description: Fetches a player's won prizes by email, validated server-to-server with a SHA256 HMAC signature.

endpoints.description: Retrieve a user's prizes with secure signature validation
